title: Amy's VanillaPlus
description: Amy's Vanilla Modpack - Contains all client-side mods so can be used on (most) servers.
body:
Amy's VanillaPlus Modpack

This is my VanillaPlus modpack. It contains only client-side mods so can be used on (most) servers. It is perfect to use on private and small servers but have caution using it on big servers like Hypixel since it does contain mods that could trigger anticheat. It adds significant optimisation over the Vanilla client while also adding QOL features like zoom, WAILA, REI, Auto third person and Shader support. My goal for this modpack was to add all the features Optifine adds plus more, while maintaining performance higher than Optifine, so that the pack runs well on low-end computers at normal graphics settings and on high-end computers with shaders and high-res resource packs at higher FPS than Optifine. It also adds graphical improvements, such as Cave Dust. Dynamic Lighting and Eating Animations. Mods, Shaders and Resource Packs: Mods:
